info.title: YummyAnime API
info.description:
**ONLY FOR PERSONAL USE!!!** For commercial use write me in [telegram](https://imcorp.t.me) or [email](mailto:yummy.anime.ru@gmail.com). 

### Introduction
For authorizing your *application*, you are **REQUIRED** to get the token from [here](https://yummyani.me/dev/applications) 
by creating a new application. Public token **required to be passed** in `X-Application` header.


All requests are working with JSON, all body also in JSON. 
 
### Users authorization

To get token, you can use [/profile/login](#/Profile/post_profile_login) method. Token is valid for 2 weeks. Refresh it every 2-3 days using [/profile/token](#/Profile/get_profile_token) method.

For authorization pass your token in the `Authorization` header with the Bearer scheme (for example, `Authorization: Bearer this.is.token.you.get`).



### Language
If you want to get content in different languages, pass `Lang` header with needed language. Accepted values for now:
- `ru` - Russian
- `en` - English
- `uk` - Ukrainian
- `jp` - Japanese (would be added soon)

Otherwise, server would look on `Accept-Language` header.

### Captcha

Website uses [HCaptcha](https://www.hcaptcha.com/), so if you get `420` error (see [bruteforce abuse warning](#operations-Profile-post_profile_login)), your app should show captcha to user and repeat the request with the same data and captcha response passed in the body.

`SITE_KEY="b1847961-208e-4a90-9671-1e6bba9e0b36"` (used in initializing HCaptcha)
 

### Response content types

The default response content type is json, but (if you really want), you can specify it using `Vary` header.
Supported values for `Vary` headers: `json`, `json5` and `xml`.

Also pass `Accept` header with each request, where include `image/avif` and `image/webp` (through comma) if client supports them (otherwise, they would be replaced by JPEG images worse quality).


### Example (Python):
```Python
import requests
requests.get('https://api.yani.tv/anime', params={'limit': 1, 'offset': 1}, headers={'X-Application': 'your_token', 'Accept': 'image/avif,image/webp'})
# OR
import asyncio, yummyanime # https://github.com/IM1corp/YummyAPI
async def main(url):
    api = yummyanime.YummyApi('your_token')
    print((await api.anime.get(url)).response)
asyncio.run(main(1))
```

### Raw swagger file
If you need RAW swagger JSON file, you can download it [from here](./swagger.json)

servers.description: API server, where all routes should be passed

fullsize.description: Anime FULL poster in JPEG format. Responsive size.

mega.description: Anime mega poster in AVIF format. 570x800px

rating.description: Current user rating for this anime

kp_id.description: Kinopoisk ID. URL looks like: https://www.kinopoisk.ru/film/{kp_id}/

sr_id.description: SovetRomantica ID. URL looks like: https://sovetromantica.com/anime/{sr_id}

category.description: Top place in anime category (ova, ona, tv, film, etc)

global.description: Global TOP place in all animes.

trailers_count.description: How many trailers are in this anime

lists_count.description: Count of users which have this anime in any lists

parameters.name: violence/graphic
parameters.description: Score indicating the likelihood of graphic or explicit violent content.

parameters.name: violence
parameters.description: Score indicating the likelihood of non-graphic violent content.

parameters.name: sexual/minors
parameters.description: Score indicating the likelihood of sexual content involving minors.

parameters.name: sexual
parameters.description: Score indicating the likelihood of sexual content involving adults.

parameters.name: self-harm/instructions
parameters.description: Score indicating the likelihood that the content provides instructions or guidance for self-harm.

parameters.name: self-harm/intent
parameters.description: Score indicating the likelihood that the content expresses intent to engage in self-harm.

parameters.name: self-harm
parameters.description: Score indicating the likelihood of references to self-harm behavior.

parameters.name: illicit/violent
parameters.description: Score indicating the likelihood of violent illicit activity (e.g., weapons trafficking, violent crime).

parameters.name: illicit
parameters.description: Score indicating the likelihood of non-violent illicit activity (e.g., illegal goods or services).

parameters.name: hate/threatening
parameters.description: Score indicating the likelihood of hateful content that includes threats against protected groups.

parameters.name: hate
parameters.description: Score indicating the likelihood of hateful expressions targeting protected groups.

parameters.name: harassment/threatening
parameters.description: Score indicating the likelihood of harassment that includes threats of harm.

parameters.name: harassment
parameters.description: Score indicating the likelihood of non-physical harassment, insults, or abusive language.
